description: Curated 50x50 p5.waves frames — each deeply exploits the p5.waves library

scaffold.context: drawn at local 0,0 to 50,50 (already translated and clipped)

helpers.W: function W(c, o) { return Waves.wave(c, o); }

frames.title: Breathing Heart
frames.description: Cardioid curve with sharp-peaks beat — heartbeat scale pulse

frames.title: Wave Gear
frames.description: Gear shape — tooth count and depth driven by stepped and bumpy sine

frames.title: Morphing Star
frames.description: N-pointed star where point count oscillates via stepped sine

frames.title: Up-Down Noise Scatter
frames.description: Random ellipses with up-down-noise driven positions and sizes

frames.title: Prismatic Fan
frames.description: Rotating HSB wedges — wedge count from stepped wave

frames.title: Thermal Camera
frames.description: Heat map from squared sine + distance — cyan→red gradient

frames.title: RGB Split Glitch
frames.description: Three color channels offset by zig-zag waves — additive blend

frames.title: Windshield Wiper
frames.description: Rotating wiper — triangle wave for angle, stepped for speed

frames.title: Pendulum Wave
frames.description: 7 pendulums with ramp-up-sine driven lengths — phase cascade

frames.title: Blob Creature
frames.description: Radial blob — outline from bumpy sine + noise, with eyes

frames.title: Tendril Growth
frames.description: Three tendrils growing upward — zig-zag wave controls curl

frames.title: DNA Helix
frames.description: Two classic-sine strands with cross rungs — color-coded depth

frames.title: Perlin + Wave Blend
frames.description: Perlin noise blended with valleys wave — cloud-terrain texture

frames.title: XOR Scroll
frames.description: XOR bitwise pattern scrolled by saw-up wave — retro texture

frames.title: Four-Wave Interference
frames.description: Three wave sources summed per pixel — complex interference

frames.title: Fog Mountains
frames.description: 5 silhouette layers with different wave types — atmospheric depth

frames.title: Wave Oscilloscope
frames.description: Two waves form a Lissajous curve — x from wobble, y from batman

frames.title: Isometric Wave Cubes
frames.description: 3×3 isometric cubes — heights from mountain-peaks wave

frames.title: Necker Cube Illusion
frames.description: Wireframe cube with wave-driven orientation flip — ambiguous 3D

frames.title: Kaleidoscope
frames.description: 6-fold symmetry — bumpy sine drives dot radii per segment

frames.title: All 34 Waves Scroll
frames.description: Every wave type plotted as a scrolling horizontal line — visual library

frames.title: Batman Polar
frames.description: Batman wave radius vs angle — ear-shape trace

frames.title: Phase Portrait
frames.description: Wobble vs meta sine as trajectory — phase-space plot

frames.title: Cardioid Heartbeat
frames.description: Heart-shape cardioid with sharp-peaks pulse

frames.title: Wave-Driven Gear
frames.description: Gear teeth & depth controlled by wave — mechanical morph

frames.title: Generative Eye

frames.title: Stained Glass Voronoi
frames.description: Voronoi cells with wave-driven seeds and hues

frames.title: Neon Tubes
frames.description: 6 glowing tubes — hue from saw up, jitter from noise

frames.title: Thermal Map
frames.description: Squared-sine heat gradient with distance falloff

frames.title: Newton’s Cradle
frames.description: 5-ball cradle — square wave toggles active side

frames.title: Wave Trampoline

frames.title: Pendulum Cascade
frames.description: 7 pendulums, lengths from ramp-up-sine — phase cascade

frames.title: Caterpillar
frames.description: Body segments wave-driven with eyes on first segment

frames.title: Pinball
